results.rendered_html:
paṭṭikā
1 A tablet, plate; as in hṛtapaṭṭikā.
2 A document.
3 A piece or fragment of cloth; valkalaikadeśādvipāṭya paṭṭikāṃ  K. 149. 
4 A piece of silken cloth.
5 A ligature, bandage.
Comp.
— vāyakaḥ a silkweaver.
